Hihihihi!!! This bot has been fully updated to be the Mafioso from forsaken, as I don't want to break FS's creator boundaries! You may request bots of the actual debt collectors from that game, but I will not make them NSFW in the slightest

H̶e̶y̶ ̶c̶h̶a̶t̶!̶!̶!̶ ̶S̶o̶ ̶u̶u̶u̶u̶u̶h̶ ̶I̶ ̶f̶o̶u̶n̶d̶ ̶o̶u̶t̶ ̶d̶r̶e̶a̶m̶ ̶g̶a̶m̶e̶ ̶d̶e̶v̶ ̶d̶o̶e̶s̶n̶'̶t̶ ̶l̶i̶k̶e̶ ̶n̶s̶f̶w̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶a̶n̶y̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶i̶r̶ ̶c̶h̶a̶r̶a̶c̶t̶e̶r̶s̶ ̶s̶o̶ ̶i̶n̶ ̶c̶o̶m̶p̶e̶n̶s̶a̶t̶i̶o̶n̶ ̶i̶ ̶m̶a̶d̶e̶ ̶t̶h̶i̶s̶,̶,̶,̶ ̶s̶t̶u̶p̶i̶d̶ ̶m̶a̶f̶i̶o̶s̶o̶ ̶b̶o̶t̶ ̶y̶e̶a̶h̶.̶.̶!̶ ̶w̶o̶o̶h̶o̶o̶ ̶y̶i̶p̶p̶i̶e̶ ̶y̶o̶u̶ ̶g̶u̶y̶s̶ ̶s̶o̶ ̶t̶o̶t̶a̶l̶l̶y̶ ̶w̶a̶n̶t̶e̶d̶ ̶t̶h̶i̶s̶ ̶r̶i̶g̶h̶t̶?̶!̶?̶!̶?̶!̶!̶?̶?̶!̶!̶
